widgets.name: BaseChat
widgets.author: Dom
widgets.description: Displays incoming Twitch chat messages with badges, colors, and emotes.

widgets.name: BouncingImage
widgets.author: Dom
widgets.tagline: Set an image to bounce around like a DVD logo!
widgets.description: Set an image to bounce like the DVD logo. Make sure to set the width and height to match your stream output and resize the browser source in OBS to match!

widgets.name: Fanart
widgets.author: dom
widgets.tagline: Rotate through a folder of fanart with artist attributions.
widgets.description: Cycles through images from a selected folder and displays the artist in the bottom-right corner, derived from each image's filename.

widgets.name: SpinningWheel
widgets.author: dom
widgets.tagline: Create and spin a customizable wheel to determine your fate!
widgets.description: Create a customizable wheel to help make decisions for you! Add wedges, customize their appearance, add sound effects, modify the text appearance, and more!
